zh.lifeSummary: 當John Wilmot於1647年4月1日出生在英國英格蘭奧可福爾哈爾波利時，他的父親Henry Wilmot33歲，母親Anne St. John32歲。他和Elizabeth Malet Countess of Rochester至少有1個兒子和3個女兒。他去世於1680年7月26日在英國奧可福爾武德斯托可享年33歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭奧可福爾斯培爾斯波利哥吉拉 沙也 邱奇。

nameMeanings.name: Wilmot
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal name Will(i)mot(t), a hypocoristic form of Willelm (see William ). Compare the Old French personal name Guillemot. This surname has been established in Ireland (Kerry) since 1614.
Walloon: from a pet form of the personal name   William  . Compare   Wilmont  .
History: Benjamin Wilmot and his wife, with their 6-year-old son William, emigrated from England to New Haven, CT, in or before 1640.

variants.name: Wilmont
meanings: Altered form of Walloon or English Wilmot . The surname Wilmont is also found in Belgium (Wallonia) and northern France, but it is very rare there.
In some cases probably also Dutch: altered form of Walloon Wilmot or of its very rare French cognate Willemont.

variants.name: Wilmarth
meanings: History: Thomas Wilmarth (1620–90) came to North America in 1639. He was one ofthe proprietors of Rehoboth, MA, in 1643.

variants.name: William
meanings: English (of Norman origin): from the Middle English personal name William, Willam, Willem, an Old Picard and Norman French form of ancient Germanic Willihelm, composed of the elements wil- ‘will, desire’ + helm- ‘helmet, protection’. This Norman personal name became widely used in England, Scotland and Wales after the Conquest, mainly no doubt in honor of the Conqueror himself. By the 13th century it had already become the most popular personal name in England. A Parisian form of the name Guillaume was also sometimes used (see Gillam ), which in medieval Wales was adopted as Gwilym (see Gwilliam ).
Americanized form (translation into English) of French   Guillaume  .

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

en.lifeSummary: When John Wilmot was born on 1 April 1647, in Charlbury, Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Henry Wilmot, was 33 and his mother, Anne St. John, was 32. He had at least 1 son and 3 daughters with Elizabeth Malet Countess of Rochester. He died on 26 July 1680, in Woodstock, Oxfordshire, England, at the age of 33, and was buried in All Saints' Church, Spelsbury, Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom.

ja.lifeSummary: John Wilmotが1647年4月1日にイギリスイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアチャールブリーで生まれた時，父Henry Wilmotは33歳，母Anne St. Johnは32歳であった。彼はElizabeth Malet Countess of Rochesterとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と3人の娘をもうけた。彼は1680年7月26日にイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアウッドストックで33歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアスペルスブリーアル サイントス' チャーチにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John Wilmot(이)가 1647년 4월 1일 영국 잉글랜드 스퍼드실르 찰버이에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Henry Wilmot(은)는 33세였고, 그의 어머니 Anne St. John(은)는 32세였다. 그는 Elizabeth Malet Countess of Rochester(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1680년 7월 26일 영국 스퍼드실르 우드스톡에서 33세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 스퍼드실르 스플스버이 앨 세인츠' c후르치에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Wilmot nasceu em 1 de abril de 1647, em Charlbury, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Henry Wilmot, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Anne St. John, tinha 32 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho e 3 filhas com Elizabeth Malet Countess of Rochester. Ele faleceu em 26 de julho de 1680, em Woodstock, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, com 33 anos, e foi sepultado em All Saints' Church, Spelsbury, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.All Saints Church, Spelsbury, West Oxfor: алл сеинц' чурч, спелсбури, оксфордшир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Wilmot родился 1 апреля 1647 г. в местности чарлбури, оксфордшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Henry Wilmot было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Anne St. John, 32. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын и 3 дочери от Elizabeth Malet Countess of Rochester. Он умер 26 июля 1680 г. в местности вудстокк, оксфордшир, Англия в возрасте 33 лет и был похоронен в местности алл сеинц' чурч, спелсбури, оксфордшир, Англия, Великобритания.
